channel.title: Yubikey on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Yubikey on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Nastavenie Yubikey na SSH v Linux-e
item.description: # YUBICO # https://support.yubico.com/hc/en-us/articles/360016649039-Enabling-the-Yubico-PPA-on-Ubuntu sudo add-apt-repository ppa:yubico/stable && sudo apt-get update sudo apt install yubikey-manager sudo apt install yubikey-personalization-gui sudo apt install yubico-piv-tool sudo apt install libpam-yubico sudo apt install libpam-u2f # check service sudo systemctl start pcscd sudo systemctl enable pcscd systemctl status pcscd #=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-= To get yubikey-manager-qt for Ubuntu 20.04/20.10 follow steps (you will have to build it yourself): git clone https://github.com/Yubico/yubikey-manager-qt cd yubikey-manager-qt sudo apt install devscripts equivs
